analysisContext.visualTheme: Cinematic Digital Painting — dramatic golden hour, painterly brushstrokes, warm saturated colors
analysisContext.sensitivityNotes: Legal/tax/immigration content requires professional disclaimers. No specific dollar amounts stated as absolute. No cultural stereotypes. Diversity rotation across all generated imagery.

existingMediaCoverage.inlineImages: None — course uses hero images and video scenes only
existingMediaCoverage.avatarVideos: 25 InfinityTalk avatar videos planned (one per lesson)
existingMediaCoverage.interactiveComponents: Knowledge checks, reflections, key takeaways already embedded in Phase 1 content

summary.rationale: Course uses InfinityTalk avatar videos as primary media. Each lesson gets a hero image, narration audio, and avatar video. Scene backgrounds will be generated in Phase 3 from video scripts.

mvp.description: Hero images + narration audio + InfinityTalk avatar videos for all 25 lessons
mvp.rationale: Complete media package using automated pipeline. No external production needed.

recommended.description: MVP plus scene-based video backgrounds for enhanced video player experience
recommended.rationale: Adds visual variety to video scenes. Significantly more images to generate but automated via pipeline.

fullProduction.description: Recommended plus podcast episodes for select modules
fullProduction.rationale: Podcast adds audio variety and deeper exploration of key topics. Optional enhancement.

avatarCharacter.description: Confident Latina woman, early 30s, dark shoulder-length wavy hair
avatarCharacter.style: Cinematic digital painting, matching course visual identity
avatarCharacter.framing: Chest up, positioned on left third of frame with open space on right for overlays

voiceProfile.tone: Warm, professional mentor — knowledgeable friend voice
voiceProfile.pacing: Conversational, moderate pace with natural pauses

landscapeThemes.module-1: City Landscape — downtown Orlando, business formation, government
landscapeThemes.module-3: Rocket Base — generic research facility, launch towers, industrial science campus
landscapeThemes.module-4: Theme Park — vibrant entertainment district, roller coasters, generic theme park atmosphere
landscapeThemes.module-5: Port / Shopping Center — busy port with cargo ships, large outlet shopping center, commercial activity
landscapeThemes.module-6: Beach — Florida beach, ocean, boardwalk, casual outdoor business settings
landscapeThemes.module-7: River Springs — natural spring river, crystal clear water, cypress trees, Florida wildlife
landscapeThemes.module-8: UCF Headquarters — modern university/incubator campus, contemporary academic buildings
